content.rendered:
ID, amount and purity analysis of Arg-BPC-157, BPC-157 with Arginine salt.

Please mind that only BPC-157 amount is measured, not the amount of Arginine salt.

In case your BPC-157 sample does not contain Arginine salt, please choose BPC-157 analysis from our offer.

You can find the test details in the parameters section below.
